nodes.context: Primarily African-American alliance of street gangs based in Southern California, founded in 1969.
Street gang formed as a federation of non-Crip gangs, main rival of the Crips.
Prison gang alliance formed in Midwest and Southern U.S. prisons.
Gang on Piru Street in Compton, California, initially associated with Crips, later broke away to form Bloods.
A Crip set involved in internal conflicts.
A Crip set involved in internal conflicts.
A Crip set that severed alliance after Washington's death.
A Crip set that later became independent and dropped the Crip name.
A Crip set in Watts, feuding with PJ Watts Crips.
A Crip set in Watts, feuding with Grape Street Crips and allied with Bounty Hunter Bloods.
A Blood set that teamed up with PJ Watts Crips against Grape Street Crips.
Listed as both ally and rival in infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: They have a long and bitter rivalry with the Bloods.
edges.context: Crips and Bloods are long-standing rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: In the late 1980s and early 1990s, as many Crip gang members were being sent to various prisons across the country, an alliance was formed between the Crips and the Folk Nation in Midwest and Southern U.S. prisons.
edges.context: Crips and Folk Nation formed an alliance in prisons.

edges.evidence_quote: By 1971, a gang on Piru Street in Compton, California, known as the Piru Street Boys, formed and associated itself with the Crips as a set.
edges.context: Piru Street Boys initially associated with Crips as a set.

edges.evidence_quote: After two years of peace, a feud began between the Pirus and the other Crip sets. It later turned violent as gang warfare ensued between former allies.
edges.context: Piru Street Boys later feuded and fought with Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: the Rolling 60s Neighborhood Crips and 83 Gangster Crips have been rivals since 1979.
edges.context: Two Crip sets have been rivals since 1979.

edges.evidence_quote: In Watts, the Grape Street Crips and the PJ Watts Crips have feuded so much that the PJ Watts Crips even teamed up with a local Blood set, the Bounty Hunter Bloods, to fight the Grape Street Crips.
edges.context: Grape Street Crips and PJ Watts Crips are feuding.

edges.evidence_quote: the PJ Watts Crips even teamed up with a local Blood set, the Bounty Hunter Bloods, to fight the Grape Street Crips.
edges.context: PJ Watts Crips allied with Bounty Hunter Bloods against Grape Street Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: The East Coast Crips (from East Los Angeles) and the Hoover Crips directly severed their alliance after Washington's death.
edges.context: East Coast Crips severed alliance with Crips after Washington's death.
